Hardware Component File

V40_27_33_CAN_95_V4

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference V40_27_33_CAN_95_V4_20090715T141021.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 500000
Send ID 7E0
Receive ID 7E8
Functional Addr 7A
Functional Name Injection

Trame DIV CC/SL I/O Sequence
Sent Bytes 2122
Reply Bytes N/A
Data Items
Gear engaged default identificationAccel pedal depressed beyond mechanical hard point (if no mechanical KD, flag remains inactive)Engine control request for speed limiter system deactivationEngine control request for speed limiter system abnormal deactivationEngine control request for cruise control system deactivationEngine control request for cruise control abnormal deactivationBraking detected for cruise controlSudden braking detected for cruise controlFLAGDETFLAGSWIState of the steering wheel buttons : not filteredInput of the cruise control main switchInput of the speed limiter main switchFLAGCNXACC frame presence detection with security on configuration detectionDetect the cruise control switch connection.Detect cruise control option with security on configuration detectionDetect the speed limiter switch connection.Steering wheel switches connection detectionspeed limiter option detection with security on configuration detectionDetect the Speed Distance Limiter optionFLAGWFINBoolean for wired brake connectionBegin stroke clutch switch connection detectionWired open active brake switch input (1=brake pedal pressed or not connected)State of the begin stroke clutch pedal (1=clutch pedal 0=pressed or not connected).FLAGFAILDetected failure : Cruise Control Steering Wheel Command Switch ivalid valueDetected failure : Cruise Control Steering Wheel Command Switch open circuitDetected failure : Cruise Control Main Switch CoherenceFLAGIMUX1The vehicle speed used for CC/SL is in mphDisplayed vehicle speed received on the CAN network not availableVehicle speed received on the CAN network not availableIn manual gearbox, the reverse position is engagedAutomatic or manual parking braking detectedGearbox is on the neutral position (information from CAN)FLAGIMUX2The automatic gearbox is not coupled to the engineThe automatic gearbox transmits a limphome, or invalid or unexpected gear valueThe automatic gearbox is on reverse positionThe automatic gearbox is on neutral positionThe clutch pedal status information is unavailableState of the clutch pedal (1=clutch pedal pressed).The brake status information is absentBraking detected with the brake switchesFLAGIMUX3Counter : increment at each START button pushCCSL Steering Wheel Command Switch blocked button detected failurevitesse véhicule provenant de la liaison multiplexéeCompilation of all the cru/sl normal deactivations due to system causes.Compilation of all the cru/sl normal causes of deactivation.Gear engaged ( [0 1 2 3 4 5 6 7] )Displayed vehicle speed received on the CAN networkCruise control or speed limiter requested speed sent to the cluster by CAN for displayCarrier of all the failures which cause CC failureCarrier of all the failures which cause CC/SL failureMaximum duration of RESUME button pressMaximum duration of SET+ button pressMaximum duration of SET- button pressMaximum duration of SUSPEND button pressMaximum value of counter for detection of blocked button.Input of the cruise control and speed limiter steering wheel push buttonsCarrier for safety failure diagnosis
Trame FT/DIV 91 I/O Sequence
Sent Bytes 2121
Reply Bytes N/A
Data Items
CONFMUX1FLGSWLKBit indicating that the Immobiliser diagnosis is availableImmobiliser diagnosis bit indicating that the engine isn't running due to a CAN network problem with BCMImmobiliser diagnosis bit indicating that the engine isn't running due to ECMImmobiliser diagnosis bit indicating that the engine isn't running due to no BCM authorisationImmobiliser diagnosis bit indicating that the engine isn't running due to BCM secure modeconnection status with ECU n°8 (AC)connection status with ECU n°7 (ACC)connection status with ECU n°4 (BCM)connection status with ECU n°3 (IP)connection status with ECU n°2 (ABS)CONFMUX2connection status with ECU n°14 (SWA)connection status with ECU n°9 (AGB)CONFMUX3connection status with ECU n°20 (USM)diag byte upon reception of AIRBAG Order frame coherentdiag byte stored upon reception of a coherent AIRBAG order frameCarrier Vxx_swlk_diag_1 Byte used to allow Immobiliser diagnosisCarrier Vxx_swlk_diag_2 Byte used to allow Immobiliser diagnosisCarrier Vxx_swlk_diag_3 Byte used to allow Immobiliser diagnosisFLAGFANHigh speed engine fan delayed commandLow speed engine fan delayed commandFan 2 activation request from agbFan 1 activation request from agbFan 2 activation request from acFan 1 activation request from acFan 1 activation request from water temperature or engine managementFan 2 activation request from water temperature or engine managementFLAGPRSAir conditioning pressure detection. Stored in E2PROMAir conditioning pressure sensor short circuit memorised failureAir conditioning pressure sensor open circuit memorised failureAir conditioning pressure sensor open circuit detected failureAir conditioning pressure sensor short circuit detected failureRelative air conditioning pressure for diagnosisFLGCRKIdiesel Preheating done (diesel engine only)diesel Preheating lamp illumination command (diesel engine only)Specific request DmdspecStatus of starter StatudemFLGCRKOFirst start detected yet FirstdemStarter fault DefdemECM Cranking authorization TopecmEngine status EtamotmxCoolant temperature in °CEngine speed

stratégie reconnaissance cylindre 1Config thermostat pilotéConnexion CTPConnexion ESPConnexion GPLConnexion pompe à airConnexion pompe à eauConnexion TDBEtat apprentissage valide 1/2 tour1ère recherche butées pap mot lors 1ère mise sous tension calculateur, effectuéeEtat premier apprentissage complet reussiEtat réapprentissage clé offEtat signal dentEtat stratégie double boucleEtat stratégie reconnaissance cylindreEtat stratégie régulation ralentiEtat stratégie régulation richesseFlag lié à la panne ressortsTaux misfire en mode contrôle en chaineType liaison vitesse véhiculeVxx_el_cnt_stt_byt1Vxx_el_cnt_stt_byt2Vxx_in_out_conf_byt1Vxx_in_out_conf_byt2Vxx_in_out_typ_byt1Vxx_sw_conf_byt1Vxx_sw_stt_byt1Vxx_sw_stt_byt2Config avec pompe à airConfig avec pompe à eau électriqueN° homologation 1N° homologation 2N° homologation 3N° homologation 4N° homologation 5N° homologationFlag of activation of the torque control by request of inter-system torqueEtat de la connexion du relais GMV 1Etat de la connexion du relais GMV 2La liaison Compresseur CLIM/INJ est connectéeBooléen de configuration de la commande des GMVsBooléen de configuration du bimodBooléen de détection de la connexion du clapet de bi-modePare brise électrique connectéétat des raccordements électriques n° 3Relais PTC circuit de réaspiration des vapeurs d'huileMano-contact de pompe à vide (niveau de pression dans le mastervac)Etat de la connexion du relais de la pompe à vide de mastervacEtat de la connexion du mano-contact de mastervacBooléen de gestion de la pompe à videConfiguration véhicule avec FreeShift (0 pas de fs, 1 fs activé)Inhibition clim immédiateSynthesis of ac conditionning inhibition engine requestInhibition clim retardéeinterdiction de la climatisation sur seuil de température d'eau.Inhibition de la climatisation sur décollages en rampeInhibition de la climatisation sur départsInhibition clim sur dépression mastervac insuffisanteInhibition de la climatisation pour éviter un calageInhibition de la climatisation sur protection thermiqueInhibition de la climatisation sur décollagesInhibition de la climatisation pour la restitution des perfo moteurConfiguration PTC anti-givrageGlobal warning lamp 1 activation requestGlobal warning lamp 2 activation requestBit de configuration véhicule Flex-Fuel ( Version Alcool)Apprentissage du taux d’alcool en coursApprentissage du taux d’alcool déjà faitAir conditioning maximum power authorized by ECMVmap
